scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] RSeq: 22 Supported: 100rel, replaces, timer Require: 100rel Record-Route: <sip:SM01@10.96.102.26;av-asset-uid=rw-3a41dd75;lr;transport=TCP> Record-Route: <sip:127.0.0.2:15060;transport=tcp;ibmsid=local.1536031164302_139451_139682;lr> Record-Route: <sip:SM01@10.96.102.25;av-asset-uid=rw-3a41dd75;lr;transport=TCP> Record-Route:<sip:192.168.6.5:5098;ipcs-line=4;lr;transport=tcp> Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=Agent 34567 8888 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 111 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=rtpmap:111 X-nt-inforeq/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$4] From: [$2] To: [$3];tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [$6] CSeq: [$5] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uac Require: timer Supported: 100rel, join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=Agent 34567 8888 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 111 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=rtpmap:111 X-nt-inforeq/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv
